title: Head of Growth
description: Sezane is hiring a Head of Growth to lead our customer acquisition and lifecycle marketing for the EU market. You will own the paid + organic mix, design the lifecycle program (welcome, post-purchase, win-back), and partner with Brand on creative. You will manage a team of 4 (1 paid lead, 1 lifecycle, 1 SEO/content, 1 analyst). Reporting to the CMO. We are a profitable DTC fashion brand with strong organic traction; the role is about layering paid intelligence on top of brand demand without diluting the look and feel.

requirements.text: 6+ years of growth / acquisition experience, ideally in DTC e-commerce or consumer subscriptions
Owned a paid budget at scale (>€2M/year) across multiple channels
Built and run a lifecycle marketing program end-to-end (welcome / post-purchase / retention / win-back)
Comfortable managing analysts and reading the LTV / CAC stack directly
Has hired and coached at least one paid-channel specialist
